title: Iran enrichment proposals exchanged via Pakistan — enrichment remains sticking point, 20-year moratorium demand
snippet: Iran and the U.S. exchanged revised proposals for peace. Washington demands a 20-year moratorium on uranium enrichment and transfer of Iran's 400kg stockpile enriched to 60%. Iran objects, claiming 'these claims have no basis in reality.' Over the past two years, the same enrichment issues have been repeatedly raised. The exchange was conducted via Pakistani mediators.
tag_reason: 업데이트 — 핵 협상 교착(src-1156) 후속: 수정안 교환 구체화, 20년 모라토리엄·400kg 이전 요구 상세
